spec_match.rationale: The counter uses current position-try-order syntax and frames remembered scroll offset as the Chrome 135 CSS path.

interactive.rationale: Users can toggle the CSS path, auto-scroll, reset counters, and inspect flip-rate metrics.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept quantifies side changes caused by scroll movement around an anchor-positioned popover.

edge_cases.rationale: The auto-scroll loop exercises repeated scroll passes without manual input.

references.rationale: The page links to ChromeStatus, the spec, and sibling demos.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables and accessible status colors.

summary: The flip counter is interactive, quantified, and aligned with the current fallback-order syntax.
